ValidationRule.description: 受注見込が1・2・3・4Cの場合、受注予定年月は必須です
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( PriceList__c = false, OR( ISPICKVAL(ExpectedOrder__c, '1'), ISPICKVAL(ExpectedOrder__c, '2'), ISPICKVAL(ExpectedOrder__c, '3'), ISPICKVAL(ExpectedOrder__c, '4C') ), ISNULL(ExpectedOrderDate__c), NOT(Creating__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 受注予定年月は必須です
